title: Reset Password
content: Users can reset their password by navigating to Settings, selecting Security, and clicking the Reset Password option. The system will send a verification link to the registered email.

title: Account Creation
content: New users can create an account by clicking the Sign Up button on the homepage. They must provide a valid email address, create a password, and verify their email.

title: Updating Profile
content: Users can update their personal information such as name, phone number, and profile picture from the Profile Settings page.

title: Deleting Account
content: Users who wish to delete their account can go to Account Settings and choose the Delete Account option. This action permanently removes user data.

title: Password Security
content: Strong passwords should contain at least eight characters including uppercase letters, lowercase letters, numbers, and special characters.

title: Login Issues
content: If users cannot log in, they should verify their email and password. They may also use the Forgot Password feature to recover access.

title: Email Verification
content: After signing up, users receive an email verification link. Clicking the link activates the account and allows full access.
